---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for WAF Payload Arsenal
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## 📊 Use Case

Describe a specific use case where this feature would be valuable.

**Example:**
```
As a [security researcher/bug bounty hunter/WAF vendor],
I want to [specific action],
So that I can [specific benefit].
```

## 🎨 Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## 📋 Feature Category

Which area does this feature relate to?

- [ ] New payloads (specify category: XSS, SQLi, etc.)
- [ ] New CVE coverage
- [ ] CLI tool improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing/validation
- [ ] Docker/deployment
- [ ] API/integration
- [ ] Other: ___________

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

What would make this feature complete?

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🤝 Contribution

Would you be willing to contribute to implementing this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] Yes, I can help with documentation
- [ ] No, but I'd like to see it implemented

## 📚 References

Any relevant links, research papers, or examples?

- Link 1
- Link 2
